channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alfonso Ribeiro Shares Photo of His ‘Last Moment’ with James Van Der Beek: ‘I Really Miss Him Already’
item.description: Ribeiro remembered the emotional moment with Van Der Beek, who died on Feb. 11 at the age of 48

item.title: Taylor Swift Shares Cheeky Nod to Her Lyrics as She Congratulates Breezy Johnson on Her Olympics Engagement
item.description: Johnson's now-fiancé Connor Watkins popped the question at the finish line of the women's Super-G event in Cortina

item.title: Police Investigating Nancy Guthrie's Disappearance Have Recovered 'Gloves' and Other Evidence
item.description: Investigators are tracking more clues in their desperate search to find Nancy Guthrie, who vanished in the early morning hours of Feb. 1

item.title: Andy Cohen Says Savannah Guthrie’s “Today” Colleagues Are ‘Somber and Sad’ amid Her Mom’s Disappearance (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'Today' anchor's mother Nancy was abducted from her home early on Feb. 1, according to authorities

item.title: Cody Ko and Wife Kelsey Kreppel Are Expecting Baby No. 2 (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple is already parents to a son, whom they welcomed in 2024

item.title: Cardi B Concert Fight Ends With Hot Dog Left on Hood of Bystander's Car, on Video
item.description: Cardi B was NOT the drama on the opening night of her new tour ... but her fans were! A parking lot brawl broke out after the show, which ended with a...

item.title: 'RHONY' Reunion Show Not Replacing Jill Zarin After Firing
item.description: Jill Zarin is out at the 'RHONY' reunion show "The Golden Life," but producers aren't looking to fill her big shoes, at least as of now ... TMZ has le...

item.title: Ja Rule Apologizes for Mid-Flight Fight With Tony Yayo
item.description: Another day, another celeb apology ... this time Ja Rule is owning up to his mile-high meltdown with Tony Yayo. The rapper dropped a statement Thursda...

item.title: D4vd's Family Summoned to Testify as Witnesses, But They're Fighting It
item.description: This looks like a big update in the D4vd case ... prosecutors want to call the singer's mother, father, and brother to testify before the grand jury i...

item.title: Cardi B's Stripper Past Mocked by Homeland Security After Her ICE Diss
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is clapping back at Cardi B's ICE diss ... by digging up her stripper past! ICYMI ... Cardi opened her "Little Mis...
